Michael Thompson
Columbus, OH 43215

Summary:
Dedicated and safety-oriented CDL-A driver with over 5 years of experience in over-the-road (OTR) and regional transportation. Proven track record of on-time deliveries and maintaining a clean driving record. Adept at navigating various routes across the Midwest and ensuring compliance with DOT regulations. Committed to providing excellent service and maintaining a professional demeanor at all times.

Experience:

ABC Freight Lines, Columbus, OH  
OTR Truck Driver  
June 2020 - Present  
- Operated Class A vehicles over long distances, delivering goods on time to various destinations across the United States.
- Maintained a clean driving record with zero accidents and violations during tenure.
- Collaborated with dispatch to optimize routes and reduce fuel consumption, improving overall efficiency.
- Conducted pre-trip and post-trip inspections to ensure vehicle safety and compliance with regulations.

XYZ Transport, Columbus, OH  
Regional Truck Driver  
March 2018 - May 2020  
- Transported freight within the Ohio region, ensuring timely deliveries and high customer satisfaction.
- Managed logistics for pick-up and drop-off locations, maintaining excellent communication with clients.
- Received recognition for exceptional safety practices and adherence to company policies.

Certifications:
- Class A Commercial Driver's License (CDL)  
- DOT Medical Card  
- Hazmat Endorsement (H)  

Skills:

- Strong knowledge of DOT regulations
